options.label: Upload Your Photo
options.help_text:
1- CROP images before uploading and help you better photos. Images with large pixels and a high resolution work best.
2- Click the SELECT IMAGE button to upload your photo or re-upload other photos if you want.
3- Adjust the position or zoom level of a photo, then click on the "REVIEW" button
